name: Landing Page Copy
description: Builds conversion-focused landing page copy systems that clarify the offer, reduce friction, and move visitors toward one primary action.

variables.name: offer
variables.description: Product, service, or promotion on the landing page

variables.name: goal
variables.description: Primary conversion goal: sign-up, purchase, lead capture, download

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Target audience and their primary pain point

variables.name: proof_points
variables.description: Testimonials, stats, or social proof available
